title: HP IQ signals a shift: Former Humane AI Pin founder Imran Chaudhri on where AI is headed next
description: HP is bringing artificial intelligence closer to users. Instead of relying solely on expensive cloud data centers, HP is focusing on running AI directly on devices. This move aims to reduce costs for businesses and improve efficiency. HP IQ is HP's new experience layer designed to unify devices and enable AI to work across them.

title: Artificial intelligence deployed at war: What happened to finding a cure for cancer?
description: AI’s champions promise cures for cancer and other wonders for a better world, but this technology is already veering elsewhere—into warfare under the cover of secrecy. Avowals of AI restraints and safety seem to have vaporized.

title: AI can sway your opinion, even when you know it's biased, study shows
description: Artificial intelligence chatbots like ChatGPT, Claude and Gemini hold the power to massively influence public opinion, new research suggests after demonstrating that people largely accept biased information given to them by an AI – even when warned not to.

title: How HP’s new IQ on-device assistant reimagines the AI interface on PCs
description: HP is using artificial intelligence to revive the PC market with their new AI companion, HP IQ. This interface is targeted at enterprise and business computers and allows users to ask questions, summarize documents, and optimize PC settings. It also has a feature for easy file sharing and conferencing. This approach mirrors Apple’s strategy.
